useCases.title: Application Scenarios
useCases.subtitle: Professional short link solutions for different industry needs

cloudDrive.title: Cloud Drive Referral
cloudDrive.desc: Shorten Baidu, Quark, Thunder cloud links with secure verification pages to reduce blocking risks and boost conversion.

offlineMarketing.title: Offline Marketing & QR
offlineMarketing.desc: Generate exclusive QR codes for each offline touchpoint with geographic and device tracking for full funnel analysis.

crossPlatform.title: Cross-Platform Deep Linking
crossPlatform.desc: Auto-detect visitor system: iOS redirects to App Store, Android downloads APK, PC shows guidance QR code.

socialMarketing.title: Social & SMS Marketing
socialMarketing.desc: Use ultra-short suffixes to save SMS character costs; brand custom domains for higher click trust on social platforms.

features.trackingDesc: Millisecond click recording with deep analysis of geography, device and browser sources.
features.abTestDesc: One entry point, multiple page splits. Optimize marketing conversion in real-time based on probability.
features.qrCodeDesc: Each short link automatically pairs with HD QR code, supporting server-side rendering for speed.
features.developerDesc: Complete OpenAPI integration with SDK and Webhooks support.
features.mobileDesc: Specially optimized for mobile environments, reducing short link blocking risks on social platforms.
features.securityDesc: Support password access, IP blacklist and visitor verification to protect sensitive data preview.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Flexible pricing for everyone from individuals to enterprises

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Common questions about short link services
faq.q1: How long do short links last?
faq.a1: Short links are valid indefinitely by default. You can set expiration time or manually deactivate anytime via dashboard.
faq.a2: Yes, you can bind your own independent domain to significantly boost brand click trust.
faq.q3: How to prevent links from being blocked on social apps?
faq.a3: We use adaptive device detection and secure page guidance technology to effectively improve mobile access success rate.
faq.q4: Can I modify the short link if the target URL changes?
faq.a4: Real-time modification is supported. You can update the target address anytime without changing the short code.
faq.q5: Do you support cloud drive referral marketing?
faq.a5: Perfectly supported. You can shorten various cloud drive links and use async redirect technology to improve click conversion on social platforms.
faq.q6: What if my cloud drive links keep getting blocked?
faq.a6: Enable secure verification page or QR code transfer function to effectively hide the original address and reduce platform blocking risks.
faq.q7: Can one short link redirect to multiple different addresses?
faq.a7: Absolutely. Through built-in A/B testing split function, you can set multiple target URLs with custom allocation ratios.
faq.q8: Why does the redirect feel faster than other platforms?
faq.a8: We use proprietary async decision engine and server-side rendering technology, compressing response latency to 2-3ms.
faq.a9: Yes, it updates in real-time. Whenever someone clicks your link, stats sync instantly to your dashboard.
faq.q10: How do you protect data privacy?
faq.a10: We follow privacy-first principles, automatically anonymizing IPs when recording locations, with all connections SSL encrypted.
